overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic urban waterfront area in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), starting in a landscaped garden under a building overhang, proceeding along an open promenade with views of the water, and ending with entry into a dark neon-lit tunnel. The scene features modern glass architecture, palm trees, and distinctive red-trimmed industrial buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: landscaped garden plaza under building overhang

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered garden area with palm trees and concrete benches

entered.detail: tall palm tree with full fronds in landscaped garden area
tall modern building with reflective glass facade and concrete pillars
white rectangular concrete seating blocks arranged in garden
green grass with rocks and small shrubs under building overhang
dark concrete structure overhead providing partial cover

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a semi-covered garden plaza with palm trees and concrete benches. The camera moves forward along a curved asphalt path beneath a building overhang, with a modern glass office building visible to the left. The area is sheltered with diffused natural lighting.

events.description: exits covered garden area into open waterfront promenade with expansive sky and water views

agents.ego_description: walking along open promenade with water view ahead and modern architecture on both sides

entered.detail: low industrial building with distinctive red trim and dark metal panels
distant view of water and horizon beyond the promenade

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open waterfront promenade with full sky visibility and direct sunlight. The camera moves forward along the asphalt walkway, with the glass office building now closer on the left and a red-trimmed industrial building on the right. The view opens up to reveal water in the distance.

agents.ego_description: approaching the dark tunnel entrance at the end of the promenade, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: dark rectangular tunnel opening at the end of the promenade

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the open promenade approaching a dark tunnel entrance ahead. The glass office building is now very close on the left, while the red-trimmed building dominates the right side. The tunnel entrance grows larger in the frame as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underpass tunnel with neon lighting

events.description: enters dark tunnel from bright sunlight, transitioning to purple neon artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: entering the dark tunnel with reflective floors and purple neon accent lights

entered.detail: dark enclosed tunnel space with smooth walls and ceiling
purple and pink neon light strips along the tunnel wall
wet asphalt surface reflecting the neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment transitions dramatically as the camera enters the dark tunnel, shifting from bright natural sunlight to artificial neon lighting. The tunnel interior features purple neon lights on the right wall and a reflective wet floor. All exterior elements disappear as the camera moves into the enclosed underpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered garden plaza into a dark, neon-lit urban tunnel. It begins beneath a building overhang, gliding along a curved asphalt path through a semi-covered garden filled with palm trees and concrete benches. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens into a bright waterfront promenade where diffused light shifts to direct sunlight, revealing a glass office building on the left and a red-trimmed industrial structure on the right. The camera continues along this open walkway, with the industrial building dominating the view as the dark mouth of a tunnel grows larger in the frame. Finally, the environment transitions dramatically as the camera enters the underpass, leaving the sunlight behind for a reflective wet floor illuminated by purple neon lights.
